citation: VA M26-7 Topic 7 — West region, family of 4, loan >= $80k
comment: Hand-calc: West family-4, loan $400k (above 80k threshold) → minimum_required = table_above_80k['west']['4'] = $1,117. Actual $1,200 >= $1,117 → pass. binding_rule_citation = 'VA-RESIDUAL-WEST-FAMILY-4' (stable format for AFFD-07).
